metadata.name: Pitch a Story Idea at an Editorial Meeting

description: A reporter has an idea for a long-form investigative piece and needs to pitch it to their editors to get it approved.

nodes.task_description: Prepare a written pitch document outlining the story idea, why it's important, potential sources, and the expected timeline.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent creates a comprehensive and persuasive pitch document.

nodes.task_description: Present the pitch verbally to the editors during the daily editorial meeting.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly and concisely explains the story idea.

nodes.task_description: Answer the editors' questions about the feasibility and potential impact of the story.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully defends the story idea and gets it greenlit.
